/usr/bin/ar qc libioc_gaialib.a CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/gaia_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/gaia_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/gaia_mag18_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/gaia_mag18_catalog_v2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/concurrent_multifile_catalog_v2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/unified_gaia_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/common_star_names.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/iau_star_catalog_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ioc_gaialib.dir/src/gaia_sqlite_catalog.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libioc_gaialib.a
